title: Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
